source_pr.title: importinto: add metrics and dashboard
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #46704

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

add metrics and dashboard for import into tasks to help monitor and diagnose.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

some board last longer than others as it's calculating rate in a time window

![img_v2_3bb48b98-d023-442f-b4af-31741eafa8fg](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/3312245/86d22d18-5526-4ddf-a123-6b3c78446e6e)
![img_v2_1030fc10-0fc8-4a50-9e1b-7ebcd8c0f3cg](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/3312245/601c8032-81d5-4688-a664-2e320af69cd7)


- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/local.go, br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/region_job.go, br/pkg/lightning/importer/table_import_test.go, br/pkg/lightning/importer/tidb_test.go, br/pkg/lightning/lightning.go, br/pkg/lightning/metric/metric.go, br/pkg/lightning/metric/metric_test.go, br/pkg/lightning/mydump/parser.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager.go, disttask/framework/proto/task.go, disttask/importinto/BUILD.bazel, disttask/importinto/dispatcher.go, disttask/importinto/metrics.go, disttask/importinto/metrics_test.go, disttask/importinto/scheduler.go, executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/chunk_process.go, executor/importer/import.go, executor/importer/table_import_test.go, metrics/BUILD.bazel, metrics/grafana/tidb.json, metrics/import.go
